name: Policy
description: Policy schema from FlashArray REST API

policy_type.description:
The type of policy. Values include `autodir`, `network-access`, `nfs`, `smb`, `snapshot`,
`quota`, and `object-store-access`.

destroyed.description:
Returns a value of `true` if the policy has been destroyed and is pending
eradication.
The `time_remaining` value displays the amount of time left
until the destroyed policy is permanently eradicated.
Once the `time_remaining` period has elapsed,
the policy is permanently eradicated and can no longer be recovered.

enabled.description: Returns a value of `true` if the policy is enabled.

time_remaining.description:
The amount of time left, measured in milliseconds, until the destroyed policy is
permanently eradicated.
